visit: I'm traveling… may I rest here for a moment?
accept: Thank you so much. I truly appreciate it.
death: The final episode of that drama… I never got to watch it…

visit: Excuse me… could I stay in this village for the night?
accept: Thank you, really. I owe you one.
reject: I see… sorry for asking… damn it!
death: Flowers… they always fade so quickly…

visit: Hey, you there. Allow me into this village at once.
My luggage is so heavy… may I rest here for a bit?
accept: How foolish… heh. Thank you, though.
death: Cheap supermarket meat… gets tough no matter how you cook it…

visit: This village is so quiet and lovely… may I come in?
accept: Thank you. That means a lot to me.
reject: Are you kidding me?! I'm never coming back to this dump! Burn it down for all I care!
death: Darling… I didn’t want to be alone… not here…

visit: Are you sure I’ll be useful? Really sure?
accept: See? You’ve got good taste, don’t you?
reject: Wow… your judgment is terrible, you know that?
death: What a harsh world we live in…

visit: I heard my family lives in this village, so I came to visit.
accept: Thank you. You really saved me.
reject: No heart at all… are you an android or something?

visit: The night road scared me… may I rest here for a while?
accept: Thank you. I feel much safer now.
reject: Are you sure you won’t regret this?
death: I just wanted a little fresh night air… that’s all…

visit: Hey! I like this village. Let me in, yeah?
accept: You good person. We friends now.

visit: I dropped my belongings on the way here… could you please help me?
accept: Thank you… you really helped me.
